metadata.seed: Rest Easy. Earlier, there was a post with this girl in it that was being raped by her former “friend (s)”. She hasn’t been active since she had orally taken a couple pills, most likely causing an overdose.As someone who’s been in a similar situation and knows how much shit like that hurts, it really hit me. Just earlier I was talking to her while I was in my English class. :( Rest easy. I didn’t know anything about you at all, but this still hits me. If anyone knows any information on this, please notify me. Other than that, Rest easy soldier. I just hope you can really Rest In Peace. You will always be remembered by me. 💔

llm_response.response:
I'm truly sorry to hear about your loss and the distressing situation you've described. It's important to remember that online communities can provide support during difficult times. If you need someone to talk to, I'm here to listen.

Regarding the incident, it's crucial to prioritize mental health and safety. If you have any information about this case or suspect someone is in danger, please reach out to local authorities or a crisis hotline immediately. In the United States, the National Suicide Prevention Lifeline is 1-800-273-TALK (8255).

In memory of your friend, consider creating a memorial or reaching out to her friends and family to offer condolences and support during this difficult time. Sending you strength and healing during this challenging period.
